portfolio.title: Solutions Portfolio
portfolio.heroTitle: More than consulting. A trusted link in healthcare.
portfolio.heroText: More than a consulting or pharmaceutical representation company, GENQUEST is a trusted link between science and patients. Our purpose is to humanize the journey of access to medications for rare diseases, connecting innovation and empathy in every interaction.
portfolio.carouselText1: We design access strategies for medications for rare diseases, supporting incorporation decisions and rational use, always with a patient-centered focus.
portfolio.carouselText2: We represent manufacturers of medications for rare diseases with ethics and transparency, bringing together industry, healthcare services, and decision-makers.
portfolio.carouselText3: We work alongside patient associations, specialists, and policymakers to strengthen the rare disease agenda in public policies and access protocols.
portfolio.carouselText4: We develop learning journeys, workshops, and content on rare diseases, supporting healthcare teams in continuous education and earlier diagnosis.
portfolio.representationCardText: We act as representatives of manufacturers of medications for rare diseases, connecting industry, healthcare services, and decision-makers with ethics, transparency, and a focus on responsible patient access.
portfolio.educationCardText: We develop continuous medical education initiatives, including content, workshops, and training journeys focused on early diagnosis, rational use of therapies, and scientific updates.
portfolio.advocacyCardText: We work together with patient associations, specialists, and public policymakers to strengthen the rare disease agenda and expand sustainable access to treatments.
portfolio.accessCardText: We design and manage comprehensive access strategies for medications, supporting regulatory, operational, and decision-making processes with a focus on the patient journey and treatment feasibility.

activity.title: Areas of Expertise
activity.industriesCardText: We work with representatives of pharmaceutical industries focused on medications for rare diseases, connecting innovation and access with ethics, transparency, and responsibility.
activity.partnersCardText: We build strategic partnerships with patient associations, specialists, and public policymakers to strengthen the rare disease agenda and expand sustainable access to treatments.
activity.colaborationCardText: We develop a collaborative network with healthcare professionals, managers, and institutions to promote early diagnosis, rational use of therapies, and scientific updates in rare diseases.
activity.heroCTA:
Do you want to be our partner?
Access the link below and fill out the form!
activity.missionCardText: To humanize the journey of access to healthcare innovation, offering comprehensive solutions to enable therapies with responsibility, excellence, sensitivity, and a strong focus on patient care.
activity.visionCardText: To build a scenario in which unmet medical needs become rare, connecting innovation to patients in an increasingly efficient, safe, and sustainable way in Brazil.
activity.valuesCardItem3: Ethics and commitment to real impact on people's lives.

patientsAndFamily.title: For Patients and Families
patientsAndFamily.guideTitle:
How to Obtain Your Medication:
Quick Guide
patientsAndFamily.guideStep1Text: Consult your physician to obtain the prescription for the required medication.
patientsAndFamily.guideStep2Text: Contact us through our contact form or by phone.
patientsAndFamily.guideStep3Text: Provide the medical prescription and the required documents to start the process.
patientsAndFamily.guideStep4Text: Track the status of your request with us until the medication is delivered.
patientsAndFamily.testimonialText: "GENQUEST was essential for me to access the treatment I needed. The team was extremely attentive and efficient."
patientsAndFamily.curiosityText1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.heroText:
Genquest was founded with a clear and non-negotiable purpose: to humanize access to healthcare innovation by operating with responsibility, technical excellence, and deep sensitivity to each patient’s reality. More than enabling treatments, we seek to transform journeys that are often marked by uncertainty, bureaucracy, and emotional vulnerability.
Our work is guided by care and active listening. We follow each stage of the medication access process in an individualized manner, understanding that every case is unique and requires dedicated attention, clear information, and safe guidance. We act as a trusted link between patients, healthcare professionals, industry, and institutions, ensuring that technical decisions are always aligned with genuine care for people.
With an ethical and transparent approach, Genquest combines regulatory expertise, strategic vision, and human commitment to make healthcare innovation more accessible, efficient, and sustainable. Our focus is to ensure that scientific progress reaches those who truly need it, at the right time, with respect, dignity, and a positive impact on the lives of patients and their families.
aboutUs.methodologyText:
The Genquest Method begins with identifying the need for an imported treatment, followed by the medical prescription. From there, the company takes full responsibility for conducting the entire process until the patient receives the medication and can begin care.
Throughout this journey, we map demands, monitor access, and provide individualized follow-up, ensuring a safer and more organized path for each patient.
